entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: An obligate root parasite of staple cereal crops that threatens food security in Africa

entities.name: OROBANCHACEAE
entities.description: The plant family to which Striga hermonthica belongs

entities.name: STAPLE CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: Crops that are parasitized by Striga hermonthica

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition resulting from food insecurity caused by Striga infestation

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic condition exacerbated by the impact of Striga on crops

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where Striga hermonthica poses a significant threat to agriculture

entities.name: STRIGA SEED RESERVOIRS
entities.description: The accumulation of Striga seeds within the soil

entities.name: INFESTED SOILS
entities.description: Soils containing a high density of Striga seeds

entities.name: STRIGOLACTONES
entities.description: Host-released chemical signals that trigger the germination of Striga seeds

entities.name: STRIGA GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of Striga seeds sprouting in response to strigolactones

entities.name: SUICIDAL GERMINATION
entities.description: A strategy to deplete the Striga seed bank by inducing germination without a host plant

entities.name: SL ANALOGS
entities.description: Synthetic compounds that mimic strigolactones to trigger suicidal germination

entities.name: EMULSIFIABLE CONCENTRATION
entities.description: A new formulation developed to improve the application and stability of SL analogs

entities.name: METHYL PHENLACTONOATE 3
entities.description: A specific SL analog evaluated in the EC formulation

entities.name: NIJMEGEN-1
entities.description: A specific SL analog evaluated in the EC formulation

entities.name: ATLAS G-1086
entities.description: A previously used formulation for SL analogs used as a comparison

entities.name: STRIGA EMERGENCE
entities.description: The appearance of Striga seedlings above the soil surface
